input: Claude Code helps developers write, test, and debug code faster using AI.
Context engineering is the practice of optimizing what information you send to an LLM to get the best results.
MCP (Model Context Protocol) allows Claude to connect to external tools and data sources.
Prompt testing helps catch regressions when you modify your prompts or system instructions.
The Anthropic API supports streaming, tool use, and vision capabilities for building AI applications.
